configurations.name: space-v1
runtimeArgs: import http.server as H, os; os.chdir('v1'); C=type('C',(H.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler,),{'end_headers':lambda s:(s.send_header('Cache-Control','no-store, max-age=0'), H.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler.end_headers(s))}); H.ThreadingHTTPServer.allow_reuse_address=True; print('serving v1 on 8123 (no-store)'); H.ThreadingHTTPServer(('',8123),C).serve_forever()
